'''Kruskob Tiltanka,''' or '''"Kob,"''' was a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] [[General/Legends|general]].

==Biography==
Tiltanka took part in the Nagai invasion of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. He led the [[Battle of Iskalon (Nagai–Tof War)|invasion of Iskalon]] and became known as the "enslaver of Iskalon".

Kob designed the Nagai [[Kob sonic blaster]],<ref name="TNEGTWAT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> and favored using it on its highest setting, able to kill sentient beings. Many other officers felt this was a dishonorable way to kill but Kob disagreed. He also created their electromesh armor, and made advances in cloaking technology, which was utilized on the [[Faruun]]-Nagai warships.<ref name="TFW" />

{{Char-stub}}
